heading: Step 4: (Optional) Update the following features:
body:
| Feature            | Description                                                                                                               |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| My Time Zone       | Timezone in which Atlas displays dates.Default: No Preference                                                             |
| My Date Format     | Format in which Atlas displays dates. Possible values are:MM/dd/yyMM/dd/yyyyyyyy-MM-dddd-MM-yydd-MM-yyyyDefault: MM/dd/yy |
| My Time Format     | Format in which Atlas displays times. Possible values are:24-hourAM/PMDefault: AM/PM                                      |
| My Session Timeout | Duration of inactivity before Atlas logs you out. To configure timeouts, see Manage Organization Settings.                |
| Appearance         | Mode in which Atlas Data Services appear. Possible values are:Light ModeDark ModeAuto (Sync with OS)Default: Light Mode   |
